name: Next.js full-stack
service_entrypoint: bash -c 'bun install --frozen-lockfile || bun install; bunx next build; mkdir -p .next/standalone/.next; cp -R .next/static .next/standalone/.next/static; cp -R public .next/standalone/public 2>/dev/null || true; cd .next/standalone; HOSTNAME=0.0.0.0 PORT=%(ENV_PORT)s exec bun server.js'
notes: Ready V1 Phase 1a stack for Next.js App Router apps. Runs on Bun and previews through Zo HTTP services.
